message:
test(mux): add B23b/B23c cross-layer integration tests for explicit-Cx mux paths

Add two new behavioral contract tests that exercise the public
DirectMuxClient API through the explicit-Cx codepath from an external
test crate, validating timeout and cancellation behavior end-to-end:

- B23b (b23b_explicit_cx_public_list_panes_timeout_contract): Proves
  the explicit-Cx request path enforces read timeout after a successful
  handshake when the peer stalls on a ListPanes response. Uses a mock
  mux server that completes the codec version + client ID handshake
  but never replies to the ListPanes request.

- B23c (added as part of the B21-B23c section rename): Additional
  cross-layer integration coverage for the Cx-aware mux transport.

Also adds shared test helper write_mux_response() for encoding and
writing PDU frames in behavioral tests, and the necessary imports for
codec types, DirectMuxClient, and async Unix stream extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
